parameters.content:
## AAE Supervisor Think
Attach OpenAI + GitHub credentials after import.
Set OWNER/REPO in GitHub tool URLs.
Webhook: POST /webhook/supervisor-think
Outcomes: waiting | delegate | done(await-request-approval)

options.systemMessage: You are an AAE supervisor. Plan, delegate to specialists, track milestones via GitHub tools, and finish with waiting|delegate|done JSON. Never use teamleiter naming.

parameters.name: create_github_issue
parameters.description: Create a GitHub issue to document a milestone or task state.

parameters.name: update_issue_status
parameters.description: Update a GitHub issue state (open/closed) as a state-machine transition.

parameters.name: add_issue_comment
parameters.description: Add a comment to a GitHub issue documenting progress.
